_publications._publicationTitle: Basement membrane proteins in extracellular matrix characterize NF1 neurofibroma development and response to MEK inhibitor.

_contextSnippet: several collagen isoforms were significantly decreased by MEKi treatment, including COL6A2, COL28A1, COL15A1, COL14A1, and COL18A1
details: Several collagen isoforms were significantly decreased including COL6A2, COL28A1, COL15A1, COL14A1, and COL18A1
